passive.player.description: If this unit perishes the run is lost.
passive.bloodfeeding.name: Bloodfeeding
passive.bloodfeeding.description:
If this unit damages a target with Bleed, heal half of damage dealt.
This effect can trigger once per turn.
passive.bloodstarved.name: Starving For Blood
passive.bloodstarved.description: At the start of the turn, if this unit failed to heal from Bloodfeeding last turn, take 2 fixed damage.
passive.preparation.name: Preparation
passive.preparation.description: At the start of the first turn, draw 2 cards.
passive.bulkyarmor.name: Bulky Armor
passive.bulkyarmor.description: At the start of the turn, gain 2 Protection.
passive.boss.name: Boss Enemy
passive.boss.description: At the start of the turn, draw the deck and recover up to maximum mana.
passive.copycat.name: Copycat
passive.copycat.description: At the start of the battle, remove all cards from hand and deck. Copies the player unit's deck and stats.
